summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of RetailIQ MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working excellently with minor chatbot interaction issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot toggle button not clickable due to overlapping emergent badge element
ui_bugs.details: The emergent badge overlays the chatbot toggle button preventing interaction. This is a UI overlay issue, not functional.

design_issues.details: Console shows chart width/height warnings but charts render correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard KPIs display (Revenue: $11,877.82, Orders: 3, Products: 12, Low Stock: 3)
Revenue trend charts and pie charts rendering
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Inventory, Store, Cart, Suppliers)
Store product grid with 12 products displayed
Cart page showing items with quantity controls
Inventory management table with proper data display
Product images and descriptions loading correctly
Proper admin role authentication and authorization
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot toggle button overlay issue - the emergent badge is preventing clicks on the chatbot button. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning to resolve the interaction conflict.
